title: Zuleika Gasimova
text:
I am a PhD student and Graduate Researcher at the University of Saskatchewan, under the supervision of Dr. Valerie Thompson. My research examines effort allocation decisions during problem-solving, sitting at the intersection of meta-reasoning and problem-solving.
Before coming to Saskatchewan, I completed a B.A. in Economics and Psychology at the University of Waterloo, where I worked in the Reasoning and Decision-Making lab and completed my honours thesis under the supervision of Dr. Jonathan Fugelsang and Dr. Derek Koehler.
My broad research interests lie in metacognition, moral and economic decision-making.
